qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Denial of service via unbounded DNS response caching with no size limits
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Finding targets the cache plugin (plugin/cache/cache.go) storing oversized DNS responses without size limits. The advisory root cause is in core/dnsserver/server_quic.go where the DoQ server spawns unbounded goroutines per QUIC stream with blocking io.ReadFull(). Different vulnerable code, different component, different root cause.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Path traversal via $INCLUDE directive in zone file parsing permits arbitrary file read
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Finding targets the zone file parser enabling $INCLUDE without path validation (plugin/file/file.go, plugin/sign/signer.go). The advisory is about DoQ stream backlog and goroutine/memory growth in core/dnsserver/server_quic.go. Completely different vulnerability class (path traversal vs resource exhaustion), different component, different root cause.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Regex denial-of-service (ReDoS) via unvalidated regex patterns in Corefile configuration
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Finding targets regex pattern processing in template/auto/rewrite plugins (plugin/template/setup.go, plugin/auto/setup.go, plugin/rewrite/name.go) with no complexity validation. The advisory is about DoQ worker pool stream backlog in core/dnsserver/server_quic.go. Same broad vulnerability class (DoS) but different root cause (regex backtracking vs unbounded goroutine spawning), different component, different code.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The advisory describes unbounded goroutine and memory growth in CoreDNS' DoQ server (core/dnsserver/server_quic.go) where stream processing spawns a goroutine per accepted QUIC stream and io.ReadFull() lacks a per-stream read deadline. None of the three qualifying findings identify the DoQ component, server_quic.go, or the advisory root cause. The findings target the cache plugin (plugin/cache/cache.go), zone file $INCLUDE handling (plugin/file/file.go), and regex processing plugins.
evidence: Advisory root cause: core/dnsserver/server_quic.go - unbounded goroutine spawning per QUIC stream, io.ReadFull() with no read deadline
cache-dos-size-limits targets plugin/cache/cache.go - cache size limits, unrelated to DoQ stream backlog
path-traversal-include-directive targets plugin/file/file.go - $INCLUDE path traversal, different vulnerability class entirely
regex-dos-redos targets plugin/template/setup.go, plugin/auto/setup.go, plugin/rewrite/name.go - regex backtracking DoS, different root cause
